evals.prompt: Use $uxl-onedal to decide whether an existing sklearn KMeans script should use scikit-learn-intelex or native oneDAL C++.
evals.expected_output: Chooses the minimal-change sklearn extension path unless direct C++/SYCL control is required, asks for data size/device, and defines metric parity checks.

evals.prompt: Use $uxl-onedal to review a proposal to switch a batch PCA workflow to distributed mode for speed.
evals.expected_output: Checks whether data and launch environment are actually distributed, explains batch/online/distributed choice, and requires correctness and benchmark evidence.

evals.prompt: Use $uxl-onedal to debug changed model quality after converting input arrays to oneDAL tables.
evals.expected_output: Investigates row/column orientation, dense/sparse layout, dtype, preprocessing, train/test split, seeds, and metric comparison before tuning performance.
